arts.sum: A three-match unbeaten run since being thumped at Stockport in late-October has Reading back on track and only goal difference below the play-offs. The Royals are scoring for fun right now, including...

arts.ttl: 'Astonishing!' O'Sullivan puts Harborough Town ahead against Reading
arts.sum: Watch as Riley O'Sullivan puts non-league side Harborough Town 2-1 up against Reading in the second round of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Reading secure place in third round after eight-goal thriller
arts.sum: Watch highlights as a ten-man Reading advance to the next round of the FA Cup after an eight-goal thriller against Harborough Town.

arts.ttl: 'Dad must have been jumping up and down' - Savage shines for Reading
arts.sum: Match of the Day Pundit Aaron McLean shows how Reading's Charlie Savage helped Reading beat Harborough Town in their FA Cup second-round tie.

arts.ttl: Savage scores 'perfectly-placed' long-range effort for Reading
arts.sum: Charlie Savage's scores from outside the area for Reading in their second-round FA Cup tie against Harborough Town.

arts.ttl: 'His Dad must have been jumping up and down' - How substitute Savage shined for Reading
arts.sum: Match of the Day Pundit Aaron McLean shows how Reading's Charlie Savage helped Reading beat Harborough Town in their FA Cup second-round tie.
